rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF BEATRICE FORSTEIN
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of An Informational Inventory & Appraisal In The New Trust Case
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Please have the CASE NUMBER and the CASE NAME ready for the clerk. Parties appearing must check in for the hearing using their FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear in person or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. Please review LRSF 14.1. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878.

rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: 1) Objection filed 2) Petition did not provide a proposed distribution of the cash. The following information pertains to appearances by Zoom: WHEN ENTERING "YOUR NAME" ON ZOOM, BOTH THE FIRST AND LAST NAME, AS WELL THE CASE NUMBER, MUST BE INCLUDED. Meeting ID: 160 225 4765 Password: 514879 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252, and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF BEVERLY WEST
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Case Management Hearing
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF BEVERLY WEST
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Letters Of Administration With Will Annexed
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Will contestant has not clear the procedural issues: 1) Need Summons issued and served pursuant to PC 8250 a. Summons served on Nahia West only. PC 8250(a) requires all persons who are to be served with Petition for Probate. 2) Need Proof of service of objection on file. Notice of Hearing filed on 1/26/22 states "Petition for Letters of Administration" being filed by contestants/objectors. 3) Need Proposed Order PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF BEVERLY WEST
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Letters Of Administration, Appointment Under Iaea
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The procedural issues have not cleared: 1) Need Duties and Liabilities of each proposed administrator 2) Need Confidential Statement of Birth Date and Driver's License Number from each proposed administrator 3) Need Clarification of Bond amount. Based on the Petition #3.d, $487,000 appears appropriate. 4) Petition to supplement Carolyn West's address on Attachment #8. No address listed. 5) Need Proposed Order 6) Need clarification attorney's representation for Ms. Whitfield. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.
